Name: Custom_Model
LuaScript:
LAST_STORED_LOCATION = ""

function onSave()
local data_to_save = {
lastStoredLocation = LAST_STORED_LOCATION,
}
return saved_data
end

function onLoad(saved_data)
LAST_STORED_LOCATION=""
LOCKED = false

if saved_data ~= "" and not bRefresh then
LAST_STORED_LOCATION = loaded_data.lastStoredLocation
end
createMenus()
end

---------------------------------------------------------------------
-- FNAME: createMenus
-- DESC: Create menu for object
---------------------------------------------------------------------
function createMenus()
self.clearContextMenu()
self.addContextMenuItem("Store Location", storeLocation, false)
self.addContextMenuItem("Recall Location", recallLocation, false)
end

function storeLocation()
LAST_STORED_LOCATION = { position = self.getPosition(), rotation = self.getRotation()}
end

function recallLocation()
if LAST_STORED_LOCATION == nil
then return
end
self.setPosition(LAST_STORED_LOCATION.position)
self.setRotation(LAST_STORED_LOCATION.rotation)
end
